    C

    Caitlyn - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Maskman
    Represents the "Caitlyn" Hero Card.

    CardView - Class in gui.card
    A graphical thumbnail representation of a game card.

    Constructs a thumbnail view for a card.
    ChallengeCard - Class in nongui.baseentity.cards.ChallengeCard
    Represents a Challenge Card in the game.
    ChallengeCard() - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.cards.ChallengeCard.ChallengeCard
    Constructs a new ChallengeCard with predefined name, flavor text, and abilities.
    ChallengeUtils - Class in nongui.gameutils
    Utility class for handling the Challenge mechanic in the game.
    ChallengeUtils() - Constructor for class nongui.gameutils.ChallengeUtils
     
    ChallengeView - Class in gui
    Represents the graphical interface for the Challenge phase.
    ChallengeView(Player, Player, BaseCard) - Constructor for class gui.ChallengeView
    Constructs a new ChallengeView stage.
    Charm - Class in nongui.listofcards.magiccard
    Represents the "Charm" Magic Card.
    Charm() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.Charm
    Constructs a new Charm card with its identity and effect text.
    ClassChangingItemCard - Class in nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard
    Represents an item card that alters a hero's class when equipped.
    ClassChangingItemCard(String, String, String, UnitClass) - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ClassChangingItemCard
    Constructs a new ClassChangingItemCard with the specified details.
    clear() - Static method in class gui.card.ImageCache
    Clears all cached images to free up memory.
    clearDiscardPile() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Deck
    Clears all cards from the discard pile.
    clearOverlay() - Static method in class gui.BoardView
    Removes the current overlay and restores click interaction to the field below.
    currentRollProperty() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
